title: Illa 60-Min Signature or 50-Min Swedish Massage Tailored with Body Scrub or European Facial (Up To 45% Off)

highlights_html: Experience the bliss of an Illa Signature Massage or pamper yourself with a rejuvenating body scrub and facial combo. Your journey to relaxation starts here!
highlights_text: Experience the bliss of an Illa Signature Massage or pamper yourself with a rejuvenating body scrub and facial combo. Your journey to relaxation starts here!
about_deal_html:
Unlock the ultimate relaxation experience with Illa Spa's exclusive offerings! Indulge in a 60-minute Illa Signature Massage that blends Thai, Swedish, and Deep Tissue techniques for deep relaxation and relief, or pamper yourself with a rejuvenating Swedish massage paired with a refreshing body scrub or luxurious European Facial. Ready to treat yourself to the wellness you deserve?

What We Offer

  • One Illa Signature 60-Minute Single Massage for One
  • Illa Signature 60-Minute Couples Massage for Two
  • 50 mins Swedish Massage and 40 mins Body Scrub
  • 50 mins Swedish Massage and 50 mins European Facial

Signature massage includes a custom blend of Thai, Swedish, and deep-tissue techniques

Why You Should Grab The Offer

?

Massage Therapist - Danielle Jeter
License Number - MT2511

Illa Spa stands out as a premier destination for high-quality massage therapy services designed to promote optimal health and wellness. With a mission focused on creating a peaceful and relaxing environment, clients can escape the stresses of everyday life and find inner peace. The skilled team of massage therapists is dedicated to providing personalized care, taking the time to listen to individual concerns and crafting tailored treatment plans that address unique needs.

One of the highlights of the spa is the Illa Signature Massage, a custom blend of Thai, Swedish, and Deep Tissue techniques that offers profound relaxation and targeted relief. Additionally, clients can enjoy a rejuvenating Swedish massage combined with a body scrub or opt for a luxurious European Facial. This facial experience includes a deep cleanse, gentle exfoliation, and a relaxing massage, all customized to each clients skin type and concerns. With high-quality products and advanced techniques, clients will leave with revitalized, hydrated, and glowing skin. Dont miss out on this opportunity to indulge in exceptional self-care and wellness at Illa Spa.

highlights: Younger than 18 must be accompanied by guardian.
fine_print: All goods or services must be used by the same person.
Merchant's standard cancellation policy applies (any fees not to exceed Groupon price).

review_quotes.text: Overall was a great experience, i just wish the person was giving me a massage went deep tissue
review_quotes.author: Mark

review_quotes.text: Very nice massage and relaxing atmosphere.
review_quotes.author: Guest

review_quotes.text: We called after finding the Groupon as we had several hours until our hotel room was ready and the lady that answered was very accommodating and needless to say, my wife and I enjoyed our couples massage! Highly recommend! Very great value for the services provided!!
review_quotes.author: Eric

review_quotes.text:
I had a great experience with Illa Spa. They were incredibly responsive and helpful, and I truly appreciated how they accommodated a same-day appointment. It made the whole process seamless and stress-free.

My massage therapist, Gg, was excellent. He was very respectful, attentive, and applied the perfect amount of pressure throughout the session. I left feeling deeply relaxed, refreshed, and ready to take on the day again.

Highly recommended.
review_quotes.author: Gaby

review_quotes.text: I had a great experience. My flight was delayed, which was going to cause me to miss my appointment. They went out of their way to accommodate me.
review_quotes.author: Guest
